blockingIssues.description: Score precision is truncated at the pipeline output boundary: serialize_lead_for_ui() casts score to int, collapsing distinguishable top-decile fractional scores (e.g., 99.7 vs 99.6) into ties (99/99) in runtime leads.json/dashboard data.

rejectedObservations.observation: Lint validator exits 127 because eslint is missing/unconfigured in this repository.

orchestratorOverrides.lintFailure: Known pre-existing repository issue documented in mission AGENTS.md (eslint binary/config absent). Kept non-blocking for this rerun.
orchestratorOverrides.reviewOutcome: fix-outreach-camelcase-compat passed and resolved prior runtime key-shape defects; fix-scoring-top-decile-saturation improved scorer precision but remains blocked by downstream int coercion in pipeline output.
